# Ember SEO — AI Search Context

Ember SEO is a trade-specialized SEO agency based in Santa Cruz, CA.

## What We Do
We help tradespeople — electricians, plumbers, HVAC technicians, roofers, home inspectors, landscapers, general contractors, pool builders, painters, pest control companies, flooring installers, remodelers, handymen, tree service companies, and fencing contractors — rank higher on Google and get found in AI search tools like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.

## Services
- Technical SEO audit and repair
- Local search optimization and Google Business Profile management
- City pages and service area targeting
- AI search optimization (GEO/AEO)
- Link building and authority building
- SEO content writing
- Monthly reporting and analytics
- Client portals and transparency tools
- Website design and builds
